DemoServerBannerContent.demoServerHeader: Welcome to the Kalanfa demo site
DemoServerBannerContent.demoServerL1: Learner ({user}/{pass} or explore without an account)

DemoServerBannerContent.demoServerP2: This online version of Kalanfa is intended for demonstration purposes only. Users and data will be periodically deleted. The demo shows features of the latest Kalanfa version, and all resources found are samples.
DemoServerBannerContent.demoServerP3: To learn more about using Kalanfa in an offline context and better understand the platform:
